name: Reporting Deadlines for Work Slips in Boise ID

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to report a slip and fall work injury in Boise Idaho?
mainEntity.text: How long do I have to report a slip and fall work injury in Boise Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Boise Idaho report slip and fall work injuries to your employer within 60 days of occurrence or knowledge for workers' comp eligibility. Late reports risk denial unless good cause shown. File with Idaho State Insurance Fund promptly.[1]

suggestedAnswer.text: Boise workers' comp requires notice within 60 days to preserve rights. Document injury details photos and witnesses immediately. Employer files Form D61 with insurer. Delays can lead to disputes by insurance adjusters minimizing claims. Local attorneys recommend free consults to navigate approvals for medical and wage benefits. Permanent disability ratings may apply for severe slips.[1]
